nodes.recentposition: Marketing Strategy Assistant @ UCI Alumni Association
nodes.involvements: ASUCI Media & Tech, UCI Alumni Association
nodes.bios: Hi everyone! I'm Aishu and I initiated in the fall quarter of my first year at UCI. In my free time, I love working at coffee shops, laying in the park, and playing Sudoku! A fun fact about me is that I almost always introduce myself as eye-shoe to help people learn my name. During recruitment, ask me about astrology or my website!
